name: starter_walkby
description: Starter controlled scenes for dSense v0 walk-by and room perturbation capture.

scenes.label: empty_room_control
scenes.instruction: Leave the room empty and keep the computer idle.

scenes.label: baseline_idle
scenes.instruction: Sit away from the machine; avoid intentional movement.

scenes.label: person_walks_front_left_to_right
scenes.instruction: Walk across the front of the computer from left to right during the action window.

scenes.label: person_walks_front_right_to_left
scenes.instruction: Walk across the front of the computer from right to left during the action window.

scenes.label: person_approaches_front
scenes.instruction: Approach the computer from the front and stop near it.

scenes.label: person_departs_front
scenes.instruction: Start near the computer and depart to the front.

scenes.label: person_walks_behind_left_to_right
scenes.instruction: Walk behind the computer from left to right.

scenes.label: person_walks_behind_right_to_left
scenes.instruction: Walk behind the computer from right to left.

scenes.label: person_stands_left_side
scenes.instruction: Stand near the left side through the action window.

scenes.label: person_stands_right_side
scenes.instruction: Stand near the right side through the action window.

scenes.label: phone_passes_near_computer
scenes.instruction: Move a phone near the computer without touching it.

scenes.label: door_open_close
scenes.instruction: Open and close a nearby door once.

scenes.label: chair_moved
scenes.instruction: Move a nearby chair during the action window.

scenes.label: fan_hvac_change
scenes.instruction: Change a fan or HVAC state if safe and allowed.

scenes.label: cpu_load_no_person
scenes.instruction: Run CPU load without a person moving near the machine.
